title: Bikewatching
description: An interactive map visualizing bike traffic patterns in the Boston area using Mapbox, showing station activity and trip flows.

title: Project 1 in DSC 106
description: A data visualization project exploring food processing scores and brand pricing, revealing that less processed does not mean cheaper.

title: Power Outages
description: A final project for DSC 80 at UCSD analyzing power outage data.

title: Project 3
description: An exploratory data analysis project examining trends in outdoor lifestyle and activity patterns.

title: Regional Economic Trends
description: A statistical analysis of economic indicators across different regions and demographic groups.

title: Housing Price Predictor
description: A machine learning model predicting housing prices using socioeconomic and geographic data.

title: Climate Sentiment Analysis
description: An analysis of social media sentiment trends around environmental and climate topics.

title: Consumer Behavior Clustering
description: A clustering analysis of consumer purchasing behavior patterns using k-means and hierarchical methods.

title: Stock Market Forecasting
description: Time series forecasting of stock market trends using ARIMA and regression models.

title: News Bias Detector
description: A natural language processing analysis of news headlines examining framing and bias detection.

title: Public Health Dashboard
description: An interactive dashboard visualizing public health outcomes across US counties over time.

title: Academic Paper Recommender
description: A recommendation system for academic papers built using collaborative filtering techniques.

title: Long-Term Climate Trends
description: Exploratory analysis of climate data examining long-term temperature trends across decades.
